subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1914-03-15
subcodes.first_line: The spiritual life postulates simplicity and contemplation combined with usefulness and well-guided activity. When we were living in Baghdad according to the custom of that country we slept on the roof
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @contemplation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
